Package com.airtribe.meditrack.service

Class AppointmentService

java.lang.Object
com.airtribe.meditrack.service.AppointmentService
public class AppointmentService extends Object
Service class for managing appointments with Observer pattern integration. Demonstrates notification of appointment events through NotificationService.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    • AppointmentService

      public AppointmentService(DataStore<Appointment> appointmentStore, DoctorService doctorService, PatientService patientService, NotificationService notificationService)

  • Method Details

    • bookAppointment

      public Appointment bookAppointment(String doctorId, String patientId, LocalDateTime appointmentDateTime, String reason) throws InvalidDataException, AppointmentNotFoundException
      Book a new appointment.
      Parameters:
      doctorId - the doctor's ID
      patientId - the patient's ID
      appointmentDateTime - the appointment date and time
      reason - the reason for appointment
      Returns:
      the booked appointment
      Throws:
      InvalidDataException
      AppointmentNotFoundException

    • getAppointmentById

      public Optional<Appointment> getAppointmentById(String appointmentId)
      Get an appointment by ID.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - the appointment's ID
      Returns:
      Optional containing the appointment or empty

    • getAllAppointments

      public List<Appointment> getAllAppointments()
      Get all appointments.
      Returns:
      list of all appointments

    • getAppointmentsByDoctor

      public List<Appointment> getAppointmentsByDoctor(String doctorId)
      Get appointments by doctor ID.
      Parameters:
      doctorId - the doctor's ID
      Returns:
      list of appointments for the doctor

    • getAppointmentsByPatient

      public List<Appointment> getAppointmentsByPatient(String patientId)
      Get appointments by patient ID.
      Parameters:
      patientId - the patient's ID
      Returns:
      list of appointments for the patient

    • getAppointmentsByStatus

      public List<Appointment> getAppointmentsByStatus(AppointmentStatus status)
      Get appointments by status.
      Parameters:
      status - the status enum
      Returns:
      list of appointments with the given status

    • cancelAppointment

      public boolean cancelAppointment(String appointmentId) throws AppointmentNotFoundException
      Cancel an appointment.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - the appointment's ID
      Returns:
      true if cancelled, false otherwise
      Throws:
      AppointmentNotFoundException

    • markAppointmentCompleted

      public boolean markAppointmentCompleted(String appointmentId) throws AppointmentNotFoundException
      Mark appointment as completed.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - the appointment's ID
      Returns:
      true if marked completed, false otherwise
      Throws:
      AppointmentNotFoundException

    • addAppointmentNotes

      public boolean addAppointmentNotes(String appointmentId, String notes) throws AppointmentNotFoundException
      Add notes to an appointment.
      Parameters:
      appointmentId - the appointment's ID
      notes - the notes to add
      Returns:
      true if updated, false otherwise
      Throws:
      AppointmentNotFoundException

      Get the total number of appointments.

      total number of appointments
